ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Vincentii Madii Brixiani et Bartholomaei Lombardi veronensis in Aristotelis librum de poetica communes explanationes
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Madii vero in eundem librum propriae annotationes. Eiusdem de ridiculis: et in Horatii librum de arte Poetica intepretatio. In fronte praeterea operis apposita est Lombardi in Aristotelis Poeticam praefatio
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On this publication see Weinberg, A History of Literary Criticism in the Italian Renaissance (Chicago, 1961)

Essay.EssayTitle: Bartholomaei Lombardi Veronensis in Aristotelis librum de Poetica ad Academicos Inflammatos praefatio

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
